description: Cross-language canonical-encoding vector for Hearth messages. Any implementation (Dart client, TypeScript backend) must reproduce expected.signedBytesHex and expected.idHex from the given input. signedBytes is canonical dag-cbor of the unsigned fields in key order v,prev,author,channel,payload,timestamp; id is multihash(sha256(signedBytes)) with the sha2-256 prefix 0x1220.
